title: Chained Locators
heading: Chained Locators & Assertions
description: Simplify nested DOM structure lookups without compromising readability.
body: Complex, nested locator chains are common when testing modular SaaS frameworks and nested rows. `pw-core` introduces dot-notation chained lookups.

assertions.title: Chained Assertions
assertions.description: Asserting nested counts or visibilities is equally simplified:
